subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-14
subcodes.first_line: The most blessed moments of my life are those which I spend in the company of the friends of God. These are the best times.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مبارکترین اوقات وقتی است که با احبای الهی ملاقات مینمایم این بهترین اوقاتست
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
